questions.question: What did the mighty angel hold in his hand?
options: A little scroll that was open
questions.correct: A little scroll that was open
questions.feedback: The angel held a little scroll that lay open in his hand.

questions.question: What happened when John ate the little scroll?
options: It was sweet in his mouth but sour in his stomach
questions.correct: It was sweet in his mouth but sour in his stomach
questions.feedback: The scroll tasted sweet as honey but turned sour in his stomach.

questions.question: Seven thunders spoke, and John was told to seal up what they said.
questions.feedback: John was told to seal up what the seven thunders said and not write it down.

questions.question: The angel swore that there would be no more _____.
questions.feedback: The angel swore there would be no more delay in God's mystery being accomplished.

questions.question: John was told he must _____ again about many peoples, nations, languages, and kings.
questions.feedback: John was told to prophesy again about many peoples and nations.
